# Diffusion

Generative sampling process that starts from noise and iteratively denoises toward a final sample.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Generative Models</span>
  <span>generative ai, denoising, iterative sampling</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Sample Gaussian noise] --> B[Initialize noisy latent]
    B --> C[Select current timestep]
    C --> D[Model predicts noise or velocity]
    D --> E[Scheduler computes next denoised state]
    E --> F{More timesteps left?}
    F -- Yes --> C
    F -- No --> G[Decode or output final sample]
```

## Notes

- The model predicts noise, velocity, or a related residual at each timestep.
- A scheduler maps the prediction into the next, less noisy latent state.
